Title: Verify successful login with valid credentials
Pre-condition: User account is already registered and active
Step: 1. Open the login page 2. Enter valid username and password 3. Click the 'Login' button
Expected Results: 1. Login page loads successfully 2. Credentials are accepted 3. User is redirected to the dashboard
Author: Test User

Title: Verify adding a new product successfully
Pre-condition: User is logged in and has access to the Product Management module
Step: 1. Navigate to Product Management module 2. Click 'Add New Product' button 3. Fill in required product information 4. Click 'Save'
Test Data: Product Name: Laptop Acer Aspire; Category: Electronics; Price: 15000000; Stock: 50
Expected Results: 1. Product module displays correctly 2. New product form is displayed 3. Data entered without validation error 4. Product added successfully and visible in product list
Author: Nhi Uyển
